excerpt: Hi there, I am new here and appricatie all the work that has been doen so I hope this is simple to answer, trying to add an energiemetered power plug which identifies as (_TZ3000_ww6drja5). According to the Universal Tuya Zigbee Device Finder this should be supported in Homey but it keeps identifying as an universal zigbee device.I am on universal Tuya Zigbee V5.5684 Experimental.
